description_long: This is a classic roadside mailbox with a cylindrical blue metal body mounted horizontally on a single wooden post. The mailbox features a red flag on the right side, which can be raised to signal outgoing mail, and a red handle on the front access door. The front door is adorned with embossed text and rivets, while the sides have horizontal red lines for added detail. The rear of the mailbox is solid and riveted, with no visible openings. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for outdoor placement in urban or suburban environments.
description: A blue cylindrical metal mailbox with a red flag and handle, mounted on a wooden post. Features include a front access door with embossed text and decorative rivets.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue mailbox body, red flag, and red handle on the front door, mounted on a wooden post.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the solid, riveted back panel of the mailbox with no openings or handles visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the blue body, red flag, and horizontal red lines, with the flag more visible on this side.
description_view_3: Front view showing the red handle, embossed text, and riveted door, which serves as the main access point for mail retrieval.
